landing.heroSubtitle: No cost. No prerequisites. Interactive courses. Everything you need to go from zero to shipping on mainnet.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to become a Solana developer
landing.featuresSubtitle: From fundamentals to advanced DeFi — learn by building real projects with interactive coding challenges.
landing.feature1Desc: Write, test, and deploy real Solana programs directly in the browser.
landing.feature2Desc: Earn soulbound NFTs that prove your skills on the Solana blockchain.
landing.feature3Desc: Earn XP, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and climb the leaderboard.
landing.feature4Desc: Fully open-source and forkable. Built for communities worldwide.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. Zero friction. Start building in minutes.
landing.step1Description: Link your Solana wallet. Your enrollment is recorded on-chain as a PDA.
landing.step1Desc: Choose from beginner to advanced tracks in Solana development.
landing.step2Description: Work through interactive challenges. Each completion earns soulbound XP tokens.
landing.step2Desc: Write code, pass tests, and earn XP for each lesson completed.
landing.step3Description: Finish a track to mint an NFT certificate. Verifiable forever on Solana.
landing.step3Desc: Receive soulbound NFT credentials that prove your skills on-chain.
landing.ctaSubtitle: No cost. No prerequisites. Connect your wallet and go.
landing.tracksSubtitle: Structured learning paths to take you from zero to production.
landing.footerNewsletter: Stay updated with new courses and features
landing.tracksDesc: Structured paths from fundamentals to advanced DeFi.
landing.trackDescFundamentals: Accounts, transactions, PDAs, and the runtime model.
landing.trackDescAnchor: Build and deploy programs with the Anchor framework.
landing.trackDescDeFi: AMMs, lending protocols, and composable DeFi.
landing.socialSubtitle: Empowering the next generation of Solana builders.
landing.testimonial1Text: Finally a platform that teaches Solana the right way. The interactive challenges are next level.
landing.testimonial2Text: Went from zero Rust to deploying my first program in two weeks. The on-chain XP is addictive.
landing.testimonial3Text: The Anchor track broke down concepts I struggled with for months. Now I actually understand PDAs.
landing.testimonial4Text: Love that my credentials are on-chain. Already used my NFT certificate in a job interview.
landing.testimonial5Text: Best free resource for Solana dev. Period. The code editor in the browser is a game-changer.
landing.testimonial6Text: The DeFi track taught me more about AMMs than any whitepaper. Practical, hands-on, brilliant.
landing.testimonial7Text: Used Superteam Academy to prep for Colosseum. Won my first hackathon a month later.
landing.testimonial8Text: The soulbound XP system keeps me coming back every day. Already on a 30-day streak.
landing.builtDifferentSubtitle: Not another video course. Your progress lives on-chain.
landing.featureInteractiveDesc: Learn by doing. Each course has a series of challenges to test your knowledge with real compiler feedback.
landing.featureNftTitle: Receive NFTs for your hard work
landing.featureNftDesc: Collect Solana NFTs as you learn. All credentials are Metaplex Core certificates, 100% verified on-chain.
landing.featureXpDesc: Non-transferable Token-2022 tokens track every lesson. Your XP is yours forever — no gaming the system.
landing.featureLeaderboardDesc: Daily streaks and achievements keep momentum going. See how you stack up against builders worldwide.

footer.copyright: Superteam Academy. Open source under MIT license.
footer.description: The open platform for Solana developers. Learn, build, and earn on-chain credentials.

solana-fundamentals.title: Solana Fundamentals
solana-fundamentals.description: Accounts, transactions, PDAs, and the runtime model. The foundation for everything you build on Solana.
solana-fundamentals.longDescription: Master the core concepts that power the Solana blockchain. You'll learn how accounts work, how transactions are processed, how Program Derived Addresses enable deterministic account creation, and how the Solana runtime executes programs. By the end, you'll have the mental model needed to build any Solana application.
solana-fundamentals.r0: Best Solana intro I've found. The PDA section finally made everything click.
solana-fundamentals.r1: Clear, concise, and the challenges are actually useful. Loved it.
solana-fundamentals.r2: Great foundation course. Would love even more hands-on exercises.

wallets-and-transactions.title: Wallets & Transactions
wallets-and-transactions.description: Key pairs, signing, transaction lifecycle, and fee mechanics. Understand what happens under the hood.
wallets-and-transactions.longDescription: Dive deep into the transaction layer of Solana. From key pair generation and wallet standards to the full transaction lifecycle — serialization, signing, sending, confirmation, and finality. You'll understand fees, priority fees, and how to build reliable transaction flows.
wallets-and-transactions.r0: Finally understand how transactions actually work end to end.
wallets-and-transactions.r1: Good pace. The retry strategies section was especially helpful.

token-program-basics.title: Token Program Basics
token-program-basics.description: SPL tokens, minting, associated token accounts, and Token-2022 extensions. Build your first token.
token-program-basics.longDescription: Learn everything about tokens on Solana — from the original SPL Token Program to the new Token-2022 extensions. Create mints, manage associated token accounts, mint and transfer tokens, and explore extensions like transfer fees, interest-bearing tokens, and non-transferable tokens.
token-program-basics.r0: Token-2022 section is gold. Nowhere else explains extensions this well.
token-program-basics.r1: Loved the hands-on approach. Actually built a token by the end!

anchor-development.title: Anchor Development
anchor-development.description: Build and deploy programs with the Anchor framework. Macros, IDL generation, and account validation.
anchor-development.longDescription: Go from zero to deploying production programs with Anchor. Learn the macro system, account constraints, error handling, events, IDL generation, and client-side integration. By the end, you'll build and deploy a fully functional program with a TypeScript client.
anchor-development.r0: Anchor finally makes sense. The constraint deep-dive was exactly what I needed.
anchor-development.r1: Great course. Would love a section on Anchor 0.31 migration.
anchor-development.r2: Best Anchor course available. The capstone project ties everything together perfectly.

testing-with-bankrun.title: Testing with Bankrun
testing-with-bankrun.description: Unit tests, integration tests, and fuzzing for Solana programs. Mollusk, LiteSVM, and test patterns.
testing-with-bankrun.longDescription: Learn how to thoroughly test Solana programs. From fast unit tests with Mollusk to integration tests with LiteSVM and Bankrun, to fuzz testing with Trident. You'll build a comprehensive test suite that catches bugs before they hit mainnet.
testing-with-bankrun.r0: Finally a proper testing course for Solana. The Mollusk section is excellent.
testing-with-bankrun.r1: Practical and well-structured. Saved me hours of debugging.

program-security.title: Program Security
program-security.description: Common vulnerabilities, access control patterns, and audit techniques. Secure your programs before mainnet.
program-security.longDescription: Learn to think like an auditor. This course covers the most common Solana program vulnerabilities — missing signer checks, account validation flaws, arithmetic overflow, re-initialization attacks — and teaches you the defensive patterns to prevent them. Includes real-world case studies from past exploits.
program-security.r0: Essential course. The exploit case studies really drive the lessons home.
program-security.r1: Every Solana dev should take this. Found two bugs in my own code after.
program-security.r2: Thorough and practical. The audit checklist is now my go-to reference.

amm-design.title: AMM Design
amm-design.description: Constant product AMMs, concentrated liquidity, and swap mechanics. Build a decentralized exchange.
amm-design.longDescription: Build a decentralized exchange from scratch. Start with the constant product formula (x*y=k), implement swap mechanics, add liquidity provision, and explore concentrated liquidity concepts. You'll deploy a working AMM program on devnet by the end.
amm-design.r0: Actually built a working AMM. The math explanations are crystal clear.
amm-design.r1: Challenging but rewarding. Would love a Part 2 on CLMM.

lending-protocols.title: Lending Protocols
lending-protocols.description: Collateral management, interest rate models, and liquidation mechanics. Understand DeFi primitives.
lending-protocols.longDescription: Understand how lending protocols work at the program level. Design collateral vaults, implement interest rate curves, build health factor calculations, and code liquidation mechanics. Essential knowledge for any DeFi developer.
lending-protocols.r0: Finally understand how Solend/Marginfi work under the hood. Incredible.
lending-protocols.r1: The liquidation implementation section is worth the entire course.

cross-program-invocations.title: Cross-Program Invocations
cross-program-invocations.description: CPIs, program-derived addresses, and composable program design. Connect programs together.
cross-program-invocations.longDescription: Master the art of composable Solana programs. Learn how to call other programs via CPIs, sign with PDAs, handle cross-program account validation, and design programs that compose cleanly with the broader ecosystem.
cross-program-invocations.r0: CPIs went from terrifying to intuitive. The PDA signing section is perfect.
cross-program-invocations.r1: Short but packed with value. Every example is practical.
